subcodes.first_line: O luminous candle! Thy services at the threshold of the All-Merciful Lord are accepted and well-beloved. Great indeed are the hopes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع نورانی خدماتت درآستان حضرت رحمن مقبول ومحبوب امید شدید است
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God
